archive_data.question_text: Which of the following rivers has Musi river as one of its tributaries?

explanation.english: Musi River is a tributary of the Krishna River flowing through the Deccan Plateau.
explanation.tanglish: Musi nadhi Krishna nadhi oda otru nadhi.

archive_data.question_text: Antibiotics are NOT effective on a virus as it lacks ______.

explanation.english: Antibiotics target bacterial cell walls or protein synthesis mechanisms, which viruses lack, making antibiotics ineffective against viral infections.
explanation.tanglish: Virusgalukku cell wall illai, anaithu antibiotics avargalai asarathu seyyathu.

archive_data.question_text: When a body rolls over the surface of another body, the resistance to its motion is called ______.

explanation.english: Rolling friction is the resistive force that occurs when an object rolls over a surface, as opposed to sliding friction.
explanation.tanglish: Oru porul mattoru porul meethu sutrum podhu undaagum attralai rolling friction endru sollappaadum.

archive_data.question_text: India secured ______ place in the World Competitiveness Index released in June 2020.

explanation.english: According to the IMD World Competitiveness Index released in June 2020, India was ranked 43rd among 63 nations.
explanation.tanglish: India 2020 IMD World Competitiveness Index il 43am idathai eduthullathu.

archive_data.question_text: In which of the following years did Razia become the Sultan of Delhi?

explanation.english: Razia Sultan ascended the throne of Delhi in 1236 AD and became the first and only female ruler of the Delhi Sultanate.
explanation.tanglish: Raziya Sultan 1236 am aandu Delhi sultan aai padaviku vandhaar.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following statements is NOT true about Ashokan pillars?

options.text: These are said to be monolithic pillars.
Ashoka got the inspiration for such pillars from his father Bindusar.
These were usually made of sandstone.

explanation.english: Ashokan pillars were inspired by Persian pillars, not by his father Bindusara. The other statements about them being monolithic, made of sandstone, and polished are true.
explanation.tanglish: Ashokan kambangal patriya poi endathu Bindusara idam irundhu inspire aiyathu endra statement. Ashoka Persian sthambangal irundhu inspire aiyaar.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following sultans of Delhi was the first one to start military campaigns in southern India?

explanation.english: Alauddin Khalji was the first Delhi Sultan to lead military campaigns into South India, expanding the empire beyond the Vindhyas.
explanation.tanglish: Alauddin Khalji thaan Delhi sulthan kalil therku India ku senai mudhalil arppanithavan.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following Articles was deleted by the Constitution (Forty-Fourth Amendment) Act, 1978?

explanation.english: Article 31 which guaranteed the Right to Property was deleted from Fundamental Rights by the 44th Amendment in 1978 and made a legal right under Article 300A.
explanation.tanglish: 44th Samvidhaana Thiruthal Article 31 a delete seithathu. Adhu ippo Article 300A kilae sadharana urimai.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following subjects is NOT listed in the Union List in the Seventh Schedule of the Constitution of India?

explanation.english: Public health and sanitation falls under the State List (List II) of the Seventh Schedule, while Insurance, Railways, and Corporation tax are subjects in the Union List (List I).
explanation.tanglish: Public health matrum sanitation Union List il illai, athu State List il ulla sadangu.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following statements about the 'pro tem' Speaker of the House of Representatives in India is correct?

options.text: The name for the post is recommended by the outgoing Speaker of the House of Representatives.
He is appointed by the President of India.
The name for the post is recommended by the Union Cabinet.
The name for the post is recommended by the Leader of Opposition in the House of Representatives.

explanation.english: The President of India appoints the pro-tem Speaker from among the senior-most members of the Lok Sabha to preside over the first sitting of the new House before the election of the Speaker.
explanation.tanglish: Pro-tem Speaker Parliament ezhaabberum podhu, Rashtrapathi idam irundhu senyor members idaiyil irundhu nominate seiyappaduvaar.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following states is a leading producer of natural rubber?

explanation.english: Kerala is the largest producer of natural rubber in India, accounting for about 90% of the country's total rubber production.
explanation.tanglish: Kerala Indiaavil rubber utpadikkum mukyamaana maanilam.
